title: Ferrite field definition
description: ADR-012. The regrowth tuning for ferrite fields, in the same shape and spirit as schema.unit.json and schema.structure.json: CLAUDE.md forbids hand-editing stats in code, so this file is the runtime source and World's compiled defaults (DefaultRegrowAmount, DefaultRegrowIntervalTicks) exist only to be proved equal to it by the selftest round-trip. Fields are map-placed rather than catalogue-driven, so the spawn amount (the regrowth cap) is a per-instance value carried on the entity and is deliberately NOT authored here; only the global regrowth rate is.

name.description: Player-facing name. British spelling. Must pass legal sweep.

regrow_amount.description: Ferrite units restored each interval. 0 disables regrowth. Set by Balance under A11.

regrow_interval_ticks.description: Sim ticks at 15Hz between regrowth steps. The placeholder is 75 (5 seconds). Must be at least 1; a field only regrows while its own remaining amount is above zero.
